category_sources: Official homepage https://lxsplit.sourceforge.net/ describes lxSplit as splitting and joining files on Unix-like platforms.

display_name_sources: Official homepage https://lxsplit.sourceforge.net/ uses lxSplit as the page heading.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes About, Usage, Download, and Links sections and is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official homepage https://lxsplit.sourceforge.net/ links to lxSplit CVS repository at http://lxsplit.cvs.sourceforge.net/lxsplit/.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://lxsplit.sourceforge.net/ documents split and join usage with -s and -j flags.
